_comment_stage: stage_id_current: -1 = single-stage (use filenames below); 0,1,2,... = multi-stage. In multi-stage mode all output filenames are auto-generated as <tag>_<stage_id>_<suffix> and the filenames section below is ignored.
_comment_run: total_num_timesteps: total HPMC sweeps for this stage (one sweep = one trial move per particle)
_comment_mc: move_size_translation: fixed translational move size d for type A. Not adaptive — set to give ~20-30% acceptance at your target packing fraction
_comment_log: log_frequency: how often to write a line to the Table log file
_comment_traj: traj_gsd_frequency: how often to append a frame to the trajectory GSD
_comment_restart: restart_gsd_frequency: how often to overwrite the single-frame restart checkpoint GSD
_comment_filenames: In multi-stage mode (stage_id_current >= 0) these are ignored and filenames are derived automatically from tag and stage_id.
